data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy training dummy. EXACT layout: 2 rows by 2 columns, four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background only: #FF00FF magenta, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no grid lines, no text.

Subject: training dummy enemy for Samsara Ascension, a straw-and-wood practice puppet with red cloth talisman strips, a simple round target mark on the torso, short wooden arms, compact readable silhouette, clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

View/framing: full body visible in each cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same scale in every frame. Subject fills about 58-66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Keep the same identity, silhouette family, palette, face/core mark, costume marks, and material language in all four frames.

Animation: idle loop with real pose changes, not scaling/camera/glow-only changes.
Frame 1 top-left: neutral ready posture, body settled.
Frame 2 top-right: visible breathing or energy inhale, shoulders/core lift slightly, a small attached aura brightens subtly.
Frame 3 bottom-left: weight shifts to the opposite side, cloth and talisman strips sway clearly, arms angle changes, body posture visibly different.
Frame 4 bottom-right: settles back toward the first pose, aura dims, loop returns naturally.

Containment: entire subject and any weapon/horn/petal/hair/sleeve/talisman/tiny aura must fit fully inside each cell; nothing crosses cell edges. No detached projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no long trail, no dust cloud.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, crisp readable silhouette, consistent lighting, minimal but polished detail, game-ready animation sheet.
